key.name: shortcut-clipboard
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to trigger the Clipboard History popup.

key.name: shortcut-emoji
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to trigger the Emoji Picker popup.

key.name: history-size
key.description: Maximum number of items to keep in the clipboard history.

key.name: tenor-api-key
key.description: API key for Tenor GIF search. Leave empty to disable GIF search or fallback to public search.

key.name: enable-gifs
key.description: Enable or disable the online GIF search tab in the picker.

key.name: ignore-sensitive
key.description: Do not capture clipboard entries copied from password managers or marked as private.
